refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify compliance with customer-defined limits.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to relevant modules.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated high-reliability network link with QoS prioritization.
DP3: Integrate real-time packet loss monitoring and dynamic adjustment algorithms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication protocol and network link quality.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically encapsulates communication quality control, minimizing coupling by isolating protocol adaptation within the communication stack.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
Assumes availability of telemetry data for monitoring.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating latency constraints explicitly in future refinements to balance packet loss and responsiveness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and communication stack responsible for teleoperation control and communication quality management.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data packets over the network.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics and status.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands and task instructions.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused containment of communication protocol logic.
Physical vehicle module; low containment relevance for communication protocol.
Highest containment score; communication protocol and packet loss management logically belong here.
Safety services monitor alerts but do not manage communication protocol.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP1 to Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution module if communication monitoring is duplicated.
Risk of interface mismatches if Teleoperation module does not fully control network link parameters.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules to avoid duplication and conflicts.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by addressing packet loss through adaptive communication protocols.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion if communication monitoring is implemented partially in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment for the selected DP, minimizing diffusion risks.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring packet loss metrics via Telemetry interface from the Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility for communication quality to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Clarify interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
Consider latency impact in future FR refinements.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements with acceptable risk and clear ownership. Verification methods are feasible and interfaces are well-defined.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to relevant modules.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; future refinements can address latency and interface clarifications.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Telemetry data is available and reliable.
open_risks: Potential interface conflicts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
evidence_needed: Packet loss measurements under operational conditions.
Interface compliance tests between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
